untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'percentage of assets in uptrend falls below 30%' and 'signal frequency drops 40% below baseline' — these are portfolio-level/meta-metrics requiring cross-asset comparison and historical signal frequency analysis, which are not supported by single-instrument indicators. The 'delayed activation lag' condition also requires time-state tracking beyond standard rule evaluation.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using price_pos_20 (position within 20-bar range) as proxy for market regime strength. Entry_short triggered when price falls to bottom 30% of range AND trend strength confirmed via ADX. This captures the directional flexibility intent but cannot fully replicate the original cross-asset portfolio conditions and signal degradation triggers specified in the source rule.
